inputs.titre: Construction du canal de l'Eure pour approvisionner Versailles en eau (projet inachevé)

reason: The image depicts workers constructing a canal in a forested area, potentially representing the Canal de l'Eure project. The clothing is generally appropriate for the era, with men wearing loose trousers or breeches and some sleeveless shirts or tunics. The tools (shovels, picks) and materials (stone, wood scaffolding) are consistent with construction techniques of the 17th century. However, the physique of some of the men is too modern. Some of the trousers look like modern work trousers (look at the seams and cuts). Also, some elements of the clothing and the way it fits could be off (the tank top of the rightmost worker looks weird). The level of physical fitness of the men is probably too modern as well.
